rows: SELECT o.*, c.* FROM orders o JOIN customers c
UPDATE orders SET status=$1 WHERE order_id=$2
narrative_hint: The SELECT on orders is called 48,420 times with 982,400 shared block reads — this is a sequential scan on a large table for every customer lookup. The mean time of 58.7ms is high for a simple lookup, confirming missing index. The JOIN query averages 705ms per call which is extremely high. Both SELECT queries need indexes. The UPDATE and INSERT are fast but high volume — they contribute to the lock held by PID 3104.
